---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or a new capability
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What is missing or hard today, and for whom (company, worker, auditor).

## Proposed change

What you would like to see. Keep it concrete.

## Alternatives considered

## Notes

Check `docs/ROADMAP.md` first. The item may already be shipped, base only, or
deferred.
